use_cases: Interactive exploration of large datasets with zoom and pan capabilities
Creative generative art visualization with mathematical patterns
Dashboard components requiring zoomable canvas areas
Educational visualization tools for exploring complex data patterns
Map or image viewer with smooth zoom transformations
ai_summary: An interactive zoomable canvas component featuring a phyllotaxis pattern with rainbow-colored dots rendered on a dark background. Supports smooth pan, zoom, and drag interactions via @visx/zoom, with an optional minimap for navigation context. Designed for exploring dense visualizations or creative generative art displays.
